visual_description: A man with short dark hair adjusts black headphones while staring at a laptop screen in a dimly lit room. The scene then shifts to a man in a black shirt seated inside a car, looking forward with a small earring visible. Finally, a woman in a dark jacket and a man in a dark jacket stand outside a lit storefront, the woman smiling upward while the man looks ahead.
